kw.name: Create Webdriver
kw.msg: Creating an instance of the Chrome WebDriver.
kw.doc: Creates an instance of Selenium WebDriver.

kw.name: Set Screenshot Directory
kw.doc: Sets the directory for captured screenshots.

kw.name: Register Keyword To Run On Failure
kw.msg: Capture Failure Screenshot will be run on failure.
kw.doc: Sets the keyword to execute, when a SeleniumLibrary keyword fails.

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Set Selenium Implicit Wait
kw.doc: Sets the implicit wait value used by Selenium.

kw.name: Title Should Be
kw.doc: Verifies that the current page title equals ``title``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains Element
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Hover Over Product And Add To Cart
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Scroll Element Into View
kw.doc: Scrolls the element identified by ``locator`` into view.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Get WebElement
kw.doc: Returns the first WebElement matching the given ``locator``.

kw.name: Execute Javascript
kw.msg: Executing JavaScript: arguments[0].click() By using argument: '<selenium.webdriver.remote.webelement.WebElement (session="838523fce115481ef8c6fae19e42de00", element="f.FB7CD561EF957C90C42395CCEB0C66D5.d.2265BB9B3B56592B70E3ACE11034F1BB.e.189")>'

kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains Element
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Page Should Contain Element
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` is found on the current page.

kw.name: Get Element Count
kw.doc: Returns the number of elements matching ``locator``.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.
Capture screenshot with failed test case name for easier traceability in reports.

kw.msg: Page should have contained element 'xpath=//a[contains(text(),'Delete Account')]' but did not.
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` is found on the current page.
kw.status: Page should have contained element 'xpath=//a[contains(text(),'Delete Account')]' but did not.

kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with given arguments and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with given arguments and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Log
kw.arg: Native click failed on Delete Account; trying JS click fallback.
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Execute Javascript
kw.doc: Executes the given JavaScript code with possible arguments.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with given arguments and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Log
kw.arg: Account deletion confirmation not visible; continuing without failing teardown.
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Log
kw.arg: Delete Account link not found, skipping cleanup.
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
Deletes the current account if logged in.

kw.name: Register Keyword To Run On Failure
kw.msg: No keyword will be run on failure.
kw.doc: Sets the keyword to execute, when a SeleniumLibrary keyword fails.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.
Executes all the given keywords in a sequence.

kw.msg: ElementClickInterceptedException: Message: element click intercepted: Element ... is not clickable at point (926, 40). Other element would receive the click: (Session info: chrome=146.0.7680.177) Stacktrace: #0 0x5648aa506a6a #1 0x5648a9f15ab5 #2 0x5648a9f6f93b #3 0x5648a9f6d572 #4 0x5648a9f6aab9 #5 0x5648a9f69ba7 #6 0x5648a9f5dbb2 #7 0x5648a9f5d4f7 #8 0x5648a9fb07b6 #9 0x5648a9f5bcbf #10 0x5648a9f5ca81 #11 0x5648aa4cca64 #12 0x5648aa4cf951 #13 0x5648aa4b921e #14 0x5648aa4d051e #15 0x5648aa49fbe0 #16 0x5648aa4f39b8 #17 0x5648aa4f3b88 #18 0x5648aa5054de #19 0x7f15e769caa4 #20 0x7f15e7729c6c
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.
kw.status: ElementClickInterceptedException: Message: element click intercepted: Element ... is not clickable at point (926, 40). Other element would receive the click: (Session info: chrome=146.0.7680.177) [ Message content over the limit has been removed. ] #1 0x5648a9f15ab5 #2 0x5648a9f6f93b #3 0x5648a9f6d572 #4 0x5648a9f6aab9 #5 0x5648a9f69ba7 #6 0x5648a9f5dbb2 #7 0x5648a9f5d4f7 #8 0x5648a9fb07b6 #9 0x5648a9f5bcbf #10 0x5648a9f5ca81 #11 0x5648aa4cca64 #12 0x5648aa4cf951 #13 0x5648aa4b921e #14 0x5648aa4d051e #15 0x5648aa49fbe0 #16 0x5648aa4f39b8 #17 0x5648aa4f3b88 #18 0x5648aa5054de #19 0x7f15e769caa4 #20 0x7f15e7729c6c

kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with given arguments and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Log
kw.arg: Native click failed on Delete Account; trying JS click fallback.
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Execute Javascript
kw.doc: Executes the given JavaScript code with possible arguments.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with given arguments and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Log
kw.arg: Account deletion confirmation not visible; continuing without failing teardown.
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Log
kw.arg: Delete Account link not found, skipping cleanup.
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
Deletes the current account if logged in.

kw.name: Register Keyword To Run On Failure
kw.msg: No keyword will be run on failure.
kw.doc: Sets the keyword to execute, when a SeleniumLibrary keyword fails.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.
Executes all the given keywords in a sequence.

test.status: ElementClickInterceptedException: Message: element click intercepted: Element ... is not clickable at point (926, 40). Other element would receive the click: (Session info: chrome=146.0.7680.177) [ Message content over the limit has been removed. ] #1 0x5648a9f15ab5 #2 0x5648a9f6f93b #3 0x5648a9f6d572 #4 0x5648a9f6aab9 #5 0x5648a9f69ba7 #6 0x5648a9f5dbb2 #7 0x5648a9f5d4f7 #8 0x5648a9fb07b6 #9 0x5648a9f5bcbf #10 0x5648a9f5ca81 #11 0x5648aa4cca64 #12 0x5648aa4cf951 #13 0x5648aa4b921e #14 0x5648aa4d051e #15 0x5648aa49fbe0 #16 0x5648aa4f39b8 #17 0x5648aa4f3b88 #18 0x5648aa5054de #19 0x7f15e769caa4 #20 0x7f15e7729c6c

kw.name: Create Webdriver
kw.msg: Creating an instance of the Chrome WebDriver.
kw.doc: Creates an instance of Selenium WebDriver.

kw.name: Set Screenshot Directory
kw.doc: Sets the directory for captured screenshots.

kw.name: Register Keyword To Run On Failure
kw.msg: Capture Failure Screenshot will be run on failure.
kw.doc: Sets the keyword to execute, when a SeleniumLibrary keyword fails.

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Set Selenium Implicit Wait
kw.doc: Sets the implicit wait value used by Selenium.

kw.name: Title Should Be
kw.doc: Verifies that the current page title equals ``title``.

kw.name: Execute Javascript
kw.msg: Executing JavaScript: window.scrollTo(0, document.body.scrollHeight) Without any arguments.
kw.doc: Executes the given JavaScript code with possible arguments.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Scroll Element Into View
kw.doc: Scrolls the element identified by ``locator`` into view.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Get WebElements
kw.doc: Returns a list of WebElement objects matching the ``locator``.

kw.name: Execute Javascript
kw.msg: Executing JavaScript: arguments[0].click() By using argument: '<selenium.webdriver.remote.webelement.WebElement (session="54bad9180f1762747696e5d6adb56463", element="f.5269B37365619F5885E18FD90AB579FB.d.FAE5546AE94AA59BC02AABA988BE6418.e.89")>'
kw.doc: Executes the given JavaScript code with possible arguments.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains Element
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Page Should Contain Element
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` is found on the current page.

kw.name: Get Element Count
kw.doc: Returns the number of elements matching ``locator``.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.
Capture screenshot with failed test case name for easier traceability in reports.
